Container.Overview: AllDebrid-Client automates the full torrent lifecycle via your AllDebrid account. Add magnet links through the Web UI, a watch folder, Sonarr/Radarr, or the REST API. Torrents are uploaded to AllDebrid, polled until ready, unlocked, and submitted to aria2 for downloading. Supports Discord notifications, SQLite (default) or PostgreSQL, FlexGet integration, and configurable file filters.
Container.Description: Self-hosted torrent automation via AllDebrid. Web UI, aria2 delivery, Discord notifications, SQLite/PostgreSQL, Sonarr/Radarr integration, and FlexGet support.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the AllDebrid-Client web interface.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Persistent path for the config.json settings file.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Persistent path for the SQLite database and automatic backups.

Config.Name: Download Path
Config.Description: Directory where aria2 saves completed downloads.

Config.Name: Watch Folder
Config.Description: Drop .torrent or .magnet files here to trigger automatic processing.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Logging verbosity. Use DEBUG for troubleshooting, INFO for normal operation.

Config.Name: Database Type
Config.Description: Leave empty to use SQLite (default). Set to 'postgres' to use an external PostgreSQL database.
